en: You
Last week I give a fire safety talk
And nobody paid any attention.
ko: 지난주에 화재 안전 교육을 했는데, 아무도 관심을 안 가졌어요.

en: It's my own fault for using PowerPoint. PowerPoint is boring.
People learn in lots of different ways.
ko: 파워포인트는 지루해요. 사람들은 다양한 방법으로 배우거든요.

en: But experience is the best teacher.
Today, smoking is going to save lives.
I'm sorry.
Does anyone smell anything smoky Did you bring your jerky in again Ahem Oh my God Uh oh my God
ko: 탄 냄새 안 나? 또 육포 가져왔어? 에헴. 세상에. 어, 세상에.

en: Fire!
Oh, fire? Oh, my goodness.
What's the procedure? What do we do, people? The bones are dead. Oh, how did that happen? It's out in the hall. No, we don't know that.
ko: 절차가 뭐야? 어떻게 해야 돼, 여러분? 전화기가 먹통이야. 어, 어떻게 된 거야? 복도 쪽이야. 아니, 그건 모르는 거야.

en: The smoke could be coming through an air duct.
ko: 연기가 환기구를 통해서 올 수도 있어.

en: Oh, my God! Okay, it's happening. Everybody stay calm.
ko: 세상에! 됐어, 일어나고 있어. 다들 진정해.

en: What's the procedure, everyone? What's the procedure? Stay calm.
ko: 절차가 뭐야, 여러분? 절차가 뭐냐고? 진정해.

en: You got down! No, no, Michael, no! Touch the handle.
ko: 엎드려! 안 돼, 안 돼, 마이클, 안 돼! 손잡이를 만져봐.

en: If it's hot, there could be a fire in the hallway. What does warm mean? Oh my gosh, try the other door.
ko: 뜨거우면 복도에 불이 있을 수 있어. 미지근하면? 세상에, 다른 문으로 가봐.

en: Not a viable option. What next? Don't run! Go to the other door. Oh, here's a door. Check that one out. How's the handle? It's warm.
ko: 그건 안 돼. 다음은? 뛰지 마! 다른 문으로 가. 어, 여기 문 있다. 확인해봐. 손잡이는? 미지근해.

en: OK, go to the back door. Well, another option. Another option. Geez.
ko: 좋아, 뒷문으로 가. 음, 다른 방법. 다른 방법. 아 진짜.

en: OK, settle down, everyone. No option. I forgot my purse. Leave it, woman. Get out of the way. Go, go, go.
ko: 좋아, 다들 진정해. 방법이 없어. 내 지갑! 두고 가, 아줌마. 비켜. 가, 가, 가.

en: No, things can be replaced, Phyllis.
ko: 아냐, 물건은 다시 살 수 있어, 필리스.

en: People, human lives, however, can...
Ah, my hand! That's hot!
This one's hot too!
Okay, we're trapped! Everyone for himself!
Okay, let's go! Let's go! Get out of my way!
Okay, okay.
Paul have you ever seen a burn victim Move it Okay procedure procedure Extra options Where do we go folks Use a what to cover the mouth
ko: 화상 환자 본 적 있어? 비켜. 좋아, 절차, 절차. 다른 방법. 어디로 가야 해, 여러분? 뭘로 입을 막으라고?

en: A what?
A rag, a damp rag, perhaps.
Let's remember those procedures. What are the options? That's the wrong way. We've already tried that.
ko: 절차를 기억하자. 선택지가 뭐야? 그쪽은 아니야. 이미 해봤잖아.

en: Remember your exit points. Exit points, people. What's next? Oscar!
ko: 비상구를 기억해. 비상구, 여러분. 다음은? 오스카!

en: Stay alive, I'm getting help. Pull me up. You're too heavy. I only weigh 82 pounds.
ko: 버텨, 도움 데려올게. 끌어올려줘. 너 너무 무거워. 나 37킬로밖에 안 나가.

en: Save Bandit!
How about 911? Anyone? 911?
What do we do?
Use the surge of fear and adrenaline to sharpen your decision-making.
ko: 공포와 아드레날린의 급증을 이용해서 판단력을 날카롭게 해.

en: Okay, I am not dying here. Come on. We'll see you back here.
ko: 좋아, 나 여기서 안 죽어. 가자. 나중에 보자.

en: What is that?
The fire's shooting at us.
What in the name of God is going on?
ko: 도대체 무슨 일이 벌어지고 있는 거야?

en: Oh my God Help Help Help Help Help
Oh, my God!
Help!
Help!
Attention! Employees of Dunder Mifflin!
This has been a test of our emergency preparedness.
There is no fire. It was only a simulation. What?
Not real. This was merely a training exercise.
So, what have we learned?
Oh, come on. It's not real, Stanley. Don't have a heart attack.
ko: 에이, 진짜가 아니야, 스탠리. 심장마비 오지 마.

en: No, no, no, no, no. You will not die.
ko: 안 돼, 안 돼, 안 돼. 넌 안 죽어.

en: Stanley! Stanley, you will not die!
Stanley! Stanley!
Barack is president!
You are black, Stanley! I'm gonna give him mouth-to-mouth. No, no, no. Don't give him mouth-to-mouth for this. You're gonna swallow his tongue. Open your mouth.
ko: 넌 흑인이야, 스탠리! 인공호흡 해줄게. 안 돼, 안 돼. 이건 인공호흡 할 게 아니야. 혀를 삼킬 거야. 입 벌려.

en: Swat, don't swallow it!
I'm fine! Leave me alone! I'm gonna go to the toilet. I'm gonna go to the toilet. Save me.
ko: 나 괜찮아! 나 좀 내버려 둬! 화장실 갈 거야. 화장실 갈 거야. 살려줘.
